key_components: TestGenerateCommand with success and invalid provider tests
TestEvaluateCommand with file loading and missing file scenarios
TestPresetsListCommand with populated and empty states

patterns_discovered.name: CliRunner Testing Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Using Click's CliRunner for CLI command testing with result.exit_code and result.output validation

patterns_discovered.name: Multi-Layer Mocking
patterns_discovered.description: Patching multiple layers: Settings class, factory.create_provider, and individual async functions (generate_song, evaluate_song, auto_improve)

patterns_discovered.name: Custom Mock Provider with State
patterns_discovered.description: _SequenceMockProvider extends MockLLMProvider with cyclic response sequencing using _call_index and _responses list
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables testing different response sequences per iteration

patterns_discovered.name: Helper Functions for Test Data
patterns_discovered.description: Reusable functions _make_suno_output and _make_eval_result to generate consistent test fixtures
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduces boilerplate and improves test readability

patterns_discovered.name: AsyncMock with pytest.mark.asyncio
patterns_discovered.description: Using AsyncMock for async functions combined with @pytest.mark.asyncio decorator

gotchas_discovered.description: _SequenceMockProvider uses modulo operator (% len) to cycle through responses, requires careful ordering of mocked calls
gotchas_discovered.impact: Medium - incorrect response order breaks tests silently
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document expected call sequence; add assertions on provider.calls length

gotchas_discovered.description: test_plateau_detection_stops_early requires careful calculation: 1 initial iteration + 3 no-improvement iterations before stopping
Multiple patch() calls stacked in single 'with' statement requires proper ordering and understanding of patch application order
gotchas_discovered.impact: Low - pattern is established but can be hard to debug
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider extracting to pytest fixtures for complex patch scenarios

gotchas_discovered.description: Using model_dump_json() and model_dump(mode='json') for mock responses requires compatibility with actual provider implementation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Low - but must match actual serialization format
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Validate test fixtures match production model definitions

approach_outcome.strategy: Comprehensive test coverage for new modules using established patterns (mocking, async testing, fixtures)
key_decisions: Created separate test files for CLI and improver modules following existing structure
Used Click's CliRunner for native CLI testing
Validated both positive cases (success, target reached) and edge cases (plateau, empty results)

recommendations.suggestion: Add error scenario tests for CLI: network failures, invalid JSON in history files, API rate limits
recommendations.rationale: Current tests focus on happy paths; error handling is critical for production use

recommendations.suggestion: Extract repeated patch contexts into pytest fixtures to reduce complexity in test methods
recommendations.rationale: Nested context managers are hard to maintain; fixtures improve readability

recommendations.suggestion: Add parametrized tests for multiple provider types (gemini vs chutes) in CLI commands
recommendations.rationale: Factory pattern creates different providers; each should be tested

recommendations.suggestion: Create integration tests combining generate→evaluate→auto-improve pipeline
recommendations.rationale: End-to-end workflow testing needed beyond unit test boundaries

recommendations.suggestion: Add docstrings to _SequenceMockProvider explaining call sequence expectations
recommendations.rationale: Custom mock helper is non-obvious; documentation prevents misuse
